text_excerpt: News | Peter Bedford Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Peter News Local Government Reorganisation Campaigns Contact Events Winter Survey 2026 News Peter slams the Government's record on apprenticeships Monday, 27 April, 2026 With nearly 1 million people, Not in Education, Employment, or Training, apprenticeships are more important than ever to help increase opportunities and encourage aspiration in the younger generation. Yet the DWP, who should be doing something about this, saw their own apprenticeship figures fall by more than 30% between 2024 – 2025, despite telling businesses to hire more young people.
